label: Meditation focus type
description: Defines a type of meditation focus that pawns can use during meditation. Controls which pawns have access via royal title or backstory category requirements.

requiresRoyalTitle.label: Requires royal title
requiresRoyalTitle.description: If true, only pawns with a royal title can use this meditation focus type. Used for the Dignified focus.

requiredBackstoriesAny.label: Required backstories (any)
requiredBackstoriesAny.description: A pawn can use this focus type if their backstory in the specified slot belongs to any one of the listed categories. An empty list means no backstory requirement.

incompatibleBackstoriesAny.label: Incompatible backstories (any)
incompatibleBackstoriesAny.description: A pawn cannot use this focus type if their backstory in the specified slot belongs to any one of the listed categories. An empty list means no backstory exclusion.
